summary: Default Package auto-provisioning fully tested. All 7 features verified: new user signup creates 12 SMS templates, 8 email templates, 6 campaigns, 6 date triggers (with correct holiday_<id> format), 3 review response templates, 5 social content templates. Backfill endpoint POST /api/admin/seed/backfill-all works and is idempotent. Review/Social templates CRUD endpoints working. Campaign sequences have multi-step with delay_days/delay_months/action_type fields.

minor.issue: Bug fix applied: line 410 referenced undefined 'org_data' instead of 'store_dict' for seed_store_defaults call

signup_creates_12_sms_templates.details: All 12 SMS templates created: Welcome, Add Socials Nudge, Review Ask, Review Follow-Up, Referral Ask, Check-In, Birthday, Anniversary, Congrats / Sold, Reactivation, Winback After Feedback, Just Because

signup_creates_8_email_templates.details: All 8 email templates created: Welcome + Card Setup, Digital Business Card, Review Request, Follow-Up / Check-In, Referral Request, Congrats / Purchase, Reputation Rescue, Reactivation

signup_creates_6_campaigns.details: All 6 campaigns created: New Account Onboarding, First 10 Reviews Sprint, Ongoing Relationship Touches, Post-Purchase Follow-Up, Reputation Rescue, Social Growth Loop

signup_creates_6_date_triggers.details: All 6 date triggers created: birthday, anniversary, sold_date, holiday_thanksgiving, holiday_christmas, holiday_new_years

signup_creates_3_review_templates.details: 3 review response templates created for ratings: 5, 3-4, 1-2

signup_creates_5_social_templates.details: 5 social content templates created for categories: intro, value, proof, community, offer

backfill_endpoint_works.details: POST /api/admin/seed/backfill-all returns status=success with user/store counts

backfill_is_idempotent.details: Running backfill twice creates 0 new records (doesn't duplicate)

date_trigger_holiday_format.details: Holiday triggers use correct format: holiday_thanksgiving, holiday_christmas, holiday_new_years (not generic 'holiday')

campaign_sequence_fields.details: All campaigns have sequences with step, action_type, delay_days, delay_months fields

campaign_send_card_action.details: Post-Purchase Follow-Up has send_card action with card_type=congrats

ongoing_relationship_uses_months.details: Ongoing Relationship Touches uses delay_months for quarterly/annual touches

admin_created_user_gets_defaults.details: Users created via /api/admin/users also get all seeded defaults

store_defaults_defined.details: DEFAULT_TAGS (8) and DEFAULT_LEAD_SOURCES (8) defined in seed_defaults.py

critical_code_review_comments: Bug fix applied: /app/backend/routers/admin.py line 410 - Changed 'org_data.get("organization_id", "")' to 'store_dict.get("organization_id", "")' because org_data was undefined in create_store function
seed_data_creation: Test users created during testing are cleaned up after each test. Test prefix: TEST_SEED_
context_for_next_testing_agent: Default Package is fully implemented. All 7 data types are seeded on signup: 12 SMS templates, 8 email templates, 6 campaigns (with multi-step sequences), 6 date triggers (birthday, anniversary, sold_date, holiday_thanksgiving, holiday_christmas, holiday_new_years), 3 review response templates, 5 social content templates. Backfill endpoint at POST /api/admin/seed/backfill-all seeds existing users. Two new routers: review_templates.py and social_templates.py provide CRUD at /api/review-templates/{user_id} and /api/social-templates/{user_id}. Store defaults (8 tags, 8 lead sources) are seeded via seed_store_defaults(). Bug fixed: admin.py line 410 now correctly references store_dict instead of undefined org_data.

mocked_apis.Twilio SMS: Mocked - not testing actual SMS sending
